chunks.text: MAK/PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-2264 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Priority. For hearing of main case. 11.06.2025. Mr. Asfandyar Jahangir, Advocate alongwith petitioner. Mr. Ali Safdar Deepar, Assistant Advocate General Sindh alongwith Insp./I.O. Syed Ghous Alam, SIU/CIA. ------------------------------ I.O. Syed Ghous Alam present in court states that he has filed challan before the concerned trial Court and the petitioner is not required further in respect of the investigation. In view of the aforesaid statement of the I.O. the instant petition is hereby dismissed being infructuous alongwith pending applications, if any. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE
